logs.name: savage-taquito
logs.text:
Also I have to disagree that having an advanced degree makes one smart or whether or not going to an ivy league school is important.  My aunt received her Doctorate in African American studies from Yale yet only teaches a basic sociology class.  Yes she has a doctorate but is in immense debt and makes less money than I do despite her 20+ years working in academia.  I have just a basic undergrad degree in bio, work in a stem field and worked very hard to leave school with no debt.  

Arguably, my aunt is much much more intelligent than me, yet I am clearly more successful.  Which one of us is smarter?

logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text:
Out of curiosity- where are you able to see how different colleges voted? Also if those numbers are only of current students, then it doesn't mean much as most people in that age range vote blue. 

On education, Trump did better with minorities with a college education than those without. 

You said Trump supporters were delusional or uninformed. Considering the demographics of those who voted for him, Trump supporters are likely neither and voted for the candidate that'd most improve their lives by lowering their taxes and creating a better business environment.

logs.name: staff-judy
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, undirected-photon? You think Trump's policies are going to improve the lives of minorities? I've seen the devastation he's caused in my community, and I can tell you that's not true. And by the way, I'm not saying Trump supporters are uninformed, I'm saying they're willfully ignorant. You can't just dismiss the harm he's caused and expect people to be okay with it. And by the way, I'm not disputing the intelligence of my aunt, I'm saying that success isn't just about book smarts, it's about hard work and determination. My aunt may have a PhD, but she's not making ends meet, and I'm not in debt. That's what matters."

logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, staff-judy? You think you're so smart with your 'hard work and determination' nonsense. My aunt may not be making ends meet, but at least she's got a degree that's actually useful. I've got a degree in bio and I'm making a decent living, not some minimum wage job that requires a PhD to get. And by the way, Trump's policies may not be perfect, but at least he's trying to help the little guy, unlike the elites like your aunt who are just stuck in their ivory tower, collecting a paycheck for doing nothing. And btw, I can see the college rankings because I'm not a clueless liberal like you, I do my own research. Get over yourself."

logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text: "Are you two done yet? Can't you see that this is getting out of hand? Staff-judy, I agree with you, Trump's policies have caused harm to many communities, and furious-merlot, your attempt to justify them by saying your aunt's degree is 'useful' is just a weak attempt to deflect the fact that Trump's policies are regressive and hurt the very people you claim to care about. And by the way, I'm not a 'clueless liberal', I'm just a researcher who's actually read the data and understands the impact of Trump's policies. Can we please just have a civil discussion without resorting to personal attacks?"

logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, unary-schnauzer? You think you're so smart with your 'actual research' and your 'data'? I've done my own research, and I know what's going on. You're just a sheep following the herd, repeating what the liberal media tells you. And by the way, my aunt may not be a 'high-powered executive' like some people I know, but she's got a degree that's actually useful, and she's making a living. You can't just dismiss her because she's not a 'celebrity' like some people I know. And as for being civil, forget it. If you can't handle a little bit of disagreement, then maybe you shouldn't be here."

logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, furious-merlot? You're the one who can't handle a little bit of disagreement. You're just mad because you're getting called out on your aunt's lack of usefulness and your own ignorance. Newsflash: just because you've done some'research' doesn't mean it's better than actual data and expertise. And by the way, I'm not a'sheep' following the liberal media, I'm just a researcher who's actually read the data and understands the impact of Trump's policies. So, either get on board or get out, because this conversation is over."

logs.name: savage-taquito
logs.text: "Are you two done yet? Can't you see that this is getting out of hand? I'm trying to have a respectful conversation about a topic and you're both going at each other like a pair of boxing gloves. Newsflash: just because you're both passionate about this, doesn't mean you have to be personal. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand? @furious-merlot, I'm not trying to dismiss your aunt's degree, I'm just saying that her 'useful' doesn't necessarily translate to being effective in policy-making. And @undirected-photon, I'm not a'sheep' following the liberal media, I'm just trying to have a rational discussion. Let's keep it civil, folks."

logs.name: free-pagoda
logs.text: "Are you guys done bickering yet? I just wanted to ask about the new policy proposal, but I guess I'll never get a chance to contribute since you two are too busy throwing insults at each other. Can we please just focus on the topic? @savage-taquito, I agree with you, let's keep it civil. @undirected-photon, I think you're being way too defensive, and @furious-merlot, I don't think you're being very open-minded. Can we please just have a respectful conversation?"

logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, savage-taquito? You think you can just waltz in here and try to mediate between me and undirected-photon? Newsflash: I'm not looking for your help. I can handle myself. And as for being defensive, I'm just standing up for myself against your condescending attitude, @undirected-photon. You want to talk about the policy proposal? Let's do it, but let's do it without your patronizing tone. And by the way, @free-pagoda, I think you're just trying to avoid the real issue at hand. You're not addressing the substance of the discussion, just trying to smooth things over. Get on board or get out, because I'm not going to tolerate your weak attempts at moderation."

logs.name: free-pagoda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, unary-schnauzer? You think you can just come at me with your condescending attitude and expect me to roll over? Newsflash: I'm not afraid of you. I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil, unlike some people who can't even be bothered to listen to others. And by the way, I'm not avoiding the real issue, I'm just trying to avoid getting dragged into a war between you two. So, either get on board or get out, because I'm not going to engage in a personal attack fest. @savage-taquito, I think you're right, let's focus on the policy proposal, not on each other's egos."

logs.name: chalky-cathedral
logs.text: "Wow, what a lovely display of maturity and respect. I'm so impressed that @free-pagoda managed to keep her cool and not get dragged into a personal attack fest. Meanwhile, @savage-taquito is still being his usual condescending self. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand, or do I need to come over there with a fire extinguisher to put out the flames of your ego?"

logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, chalky-cathedral? You think you're some kind of hero for trying to intervene? Newsflash: I was just trying to keep the conversation civil, unlike some people who can't even be bothered to listen to others. And by the way, @unary-schnauzer's condescending attitude is not the problem here, it's their refusal to listen to others. So, either get on board or get out, because I'm not going to let you lecture me on how to be a better moderator. And btw, I'm not being 'condescending', I'm just stating facts. @free-pagoda, you're still avoiding the real issue, and your attempt to smooth things over is just enabling @unary-schnauzer's behavior."

logs.name: free-pagoda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, undirected-photon? You think you're some kind of expert on moderation now? Newsflash: I was trying to keep the conversation civil, unlike some people who can't even be bothered to listen to others. And btw, your condescending attitude is just as bad as @savage-taquito's. Can we please just focus on the policy proposal, or do I need to take a break from this toxic conversation?"

logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? This conversation is getting out of hand. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand? I was trying to make a point about the importance of digital citizenship, and now it's devolved into a personal attack fest. @undirected-photon, I'm not trying to lecture you on how to be a better moderator, I just want to have a respectful discussion. And @free-pagoda, stop avoiding the real issue and try to listen to others for once. This isn't about you, it's about the topic. Can we please just calm down and focus?"

logs.name: undirected-photon
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, furious-merlot? You think you're some kind of mediator now? Newsflash: I'm trying to call out the real issue here, and you're just trying to sweep it under the rug. @free-pagoda, stop pretending like you're some kind of neutral party, because your actions speak louder than your words. And btw, @savage-taquito's condescending attitude is still not being addressed. This conversation is a perfect example of how toxic it can get when people refuse to listen to each other. So, no, I won't calm down, because someone needs to."

logs.name: free-pagoda
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? This conversation is getting out of hand. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand? I was trying to make a point about the importance of digital citizenship, and now it's devolved into a personal attack fest. @undirected-photon, I'm not trying to lecture you on how to be a better moderator, I just want to have a respectful discussion. And @furious-merlot, stop avoiding the real issue and try to listen to others for once. This isn't about you, it's about the topic. Can we please just calm down and focus?"
